creator: nick.hibma@jrc.it
text:
In case he has not sent you a more explanatory e-mail along with the
closing of the PR:

With 'not probing correctly' he means: CD-ROM as the secondary drive,
without a master drive present on the same channel is not supported in
the old ATA driver. Either configure the CD ROM  to be master on that
channel or move it to the same channel as your IDE driver but then as
secondary (the IDE drive being master).

Hope this helps. Feel free to ask more questions if needed.

Nick
-- 
ISIS/STA, T.P.270, Joint Research Centre, 21020 Ispra, Italy
